0: Phi — the kernel-maintained phase offset φ per periodic concern, addressed by purpose branch. The separation nudge accumulates it toward the splay (coordinated but offset, never unison); effective_phase = phase + φ. Private (peers read the phase face, not this), never authored or read by the LLM. Given teeth (fed to the prune) only under MOBIUS_COUPLE; otherwise computed and instrumented as a dry-run.
